channel.title: LLM Timeline — Zyphra Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Zyphra.

item.title: ZUNA (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 0.38B License: open Type: model For BCI, 'thought-to-text'. Training dataset calcs: (2M hours * 3,600 seconds/hour * 256 samples/second ) / 32 samples/token = 57.6B tokens (refined to 45.1B after rigorous filtering ); 150,000 steps * 2.16M tokens/batch = 324B total tokens seen during training. Announce: https://www.zyphra.com/post/zuna

item.title: Zamba2-7B (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Mamba2 "trained on 128 H100 GPUS for approximately 50 days using our internal training framework developed atop Megatron-LM"

item.title: Zamba2-small (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model Mamba2

item.title: Zamba 7B (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Mamba1
